title: Database Slowdown Cascade
description: Postgres slow queries cascade into API degradation; replica failover restores service.

title: DDoS at the Edge
description: L7 flood saturates the edge LB; downstream APIs throttle, attack subsides, traffic normalises.

title: Bad Canary Deploy
description: Canary fails health checks; LB shifts traffic and the rest of the fleet absorbs the load until rollback.

title: Cache Failure Cascade
description: Redis OOM forces reads onto Postgres; pool exhausts; APIs degrade until cache recovers.

title: Credential Stuffing → Account Takeover
description: Brute force on auth-api breaks through; lateral movement and bulk PII reads before containment.

title: Healthy Baseline — No Incident
description: A well-behaved three-tier app for 20 minutes. Reference dataset for detection rule tuning.
